paired_card.line: Filter a gallery by rating, selection or status.

copy: A forest of green, every tree in its place in the mist. Filter a gallery by rating, selection or status – everything stays findable.
alt: A misty forest where the trees emerge softly in the morning light. The varied green tones of the trees and the mist create a calm, mysterious atmosphere.
alt_product: moodcase gallery view showing the misty-forest shot filtered by rating, selection and status.
